name: IRA Negotiated Drugs
description: Drugs selected for Medicare price negotiation under the Inflation Reduction Act. Rounds 1 (2026), 2 (2027), and 3 (2028).
join_hint: JOIN reference ON dataset.Brnd_Name LIKE reference.drug_name || '%'

name: GLOBE Model Exclusions
description: Drugs excluded from the CMS GLOBE payment model. Covers IRA-negotiated drugs, biosimilars, reference biologics with active biosimilars, generics, and non-GLOBE category drugs.
